name: Clams Casino
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut bacon into squares.
2. Scrub the clams well and place them in a clam broiler basket or colander.
3. In the bottom of the broiler pan, combine water, garlic, butter, salt, and pepper.
4. Place the clam mixture on high heat until the clams open.
5. Layer the clams on half shells.
6. Spoon the broth over the clams and squeeze lemon juice over them.
7. Place a bacon square on each clam.
8. Broil until the bacon is crisp.
Serves 8
